log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:6+3=9 vs AC 20] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist.
→ Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist: DEX save [d20:4+6=10 vs DC 11] FAIL! 5 radiant damage. HP: 54/59

REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.

--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:16+3=19 vs AC 20] MISS.

REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist: SUCCESS. (had advantage) 13 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist --- HP: 41/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):2+1=3 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):8+1=9 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):13+1=14 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 5/5 targets affected.
